title: Stainless Steel Salt & Pepper Shaker Set - Silver - Small Kitchen Table Camping Condiment Spice Jar Holder Dispenser Pots - By Ashley
features: These durable glass & stainless steel material salt & pepper shakers come with screw-off caps perforated with S & P lettering & the glass bottoms help verify when the shakers are getting low.
They are easy to clean by simply hand washing then towel or air drying before refilling & are perfect for your kitchen at home, cafes, restaurants etc.
